note: Static convenience snapshot of the PUBLIC mandate-acts feed. Not a trust root: check any live row against a mesh node via /record/{record_id} and /mandate/status/{record_id}, or fully offline with elara-verify. Rows marked archived have aged out of the node's bounded hot tier (records prune into sealed history by design) — the live routes no longer serve them; their offline envelopes, where present, remain verifiable.
